hindi: जय विंध्येश्वरी देवी माता। विंध्य पर्वत की अधिष्ठाता॥
english: Victory to Vindhyeshwari Devi Mata; presiding deity of the Vindhya mountains
roman: Jai Vindhyeshwari Devi Mata, Vindhya Parvat Ki Adhishtata

hindi: विंध्याचल में विराजत माता। भक्त जनों की सब दुख हर्ता॥
english: Mother dwelling in Vindhyachal; remover of all sorrows of devotees
roman: Vindhyachal Mein Virajat Mata, Bhakt Janon Ki Sab Dukh Harta

hindi: काली महाकाली और दुर्गा। तुम्हीं हो तीनों शक्ति पूर्गा॥
english: Kali, Mahakali and Durga; you are all three powers fulfilled
roman: Kali Mahakali Aur Durga, Tumhin Ho Tinon Shakti Purga

hindi: नवरात्रि में विशेष पूजन। भक्त लाखों करते दर्शन॥
english: Special worship is held during Navratri; lakhs of devotees take darshan
roman: Navratri Mein Vishesh Poojan, Bhakt Laakhon Karte Darshan

hindi: विंध्याचल की यात्रा पावन। पाप सब धुलते हृदय रावन॥
english: The pilgrimage to Vindhyachal is sacred; all sins are washed away from the heart
roman: Vindhyachal Ki Yatra Pavan, Pap Sab Dhulte Hriday Ravan

hindi: विंध्येश्वरी चालीसा जो गावे। संकट से मुक्ति सहज पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Vindhyeshwari Chalisa; easily attains freedom from troubles
roman: Vindhyeshwari Chalisa Jo Gaave, Sankat Se Mukti Sahaj Paave

hindi: जय जय विंध्येश्वरी माता दानी। भक्तन की हर मनोकामना रानी॥
english: Victory to Vindhyeshwari Mata the giver; queen who fulfils every wish of devotees
roman: Jai Jai Vindhyeshwari Mata Dani, Bhaktan Ki Har Manokamna Rani
